## How to install

1. Install [UE4SS](https://github.com/Okaetsu/RE-UE4SS) for Palworld first.
2. Download the `.zip` below.
3. Extract it into your UE4SS folder so the `Mods` folder **merges** with the existing one:

   `...\steamapps\common\Palworld\Pal\Binaries\Win64\ue4ss\`

   After extracting you should have:
   - `ue4ss\Mods\shared\KeboldersPalLib\`
   - `ue4ss\Mods\PalLibLoader\`
4. Launch the game. Once you're in a world you'll see a
   `[KeboldersPalLib] Version ...` banner in chat, confirming it loaded.

> Older UE4SS installs use `...\Win64\Mods\` (no `ue4ss` subfolder). If that's
> your layout, extract there instead.

This is a library — install it alongside any mod that requires KeboldersPalLib.
